description: Qualified agent review data for tickets. Each row is a review decision by a qualified agent for a specific ai_human_comparison record. Foreign key to ai_human_comparison via comparison_id. Uses UPSERT on comparison_id.

columns.name: comparison_id
columns.description: Foreign key to ai_human_comparison.id. Unique constraint for UPSERT. NOT NULL.

columns.name: ai_approved
columns.description: Whether the qualified agent approved the AI output without changes. True = high quality AI output.

columns.name: reviewer_name
columns.description: Name of the qualified agent who performed the review

columns.name: requires_editing_correct
columns.description: Whether the editing requirement was correctly identified

columns.name: action_analysis_verification
columns.description: JSONB field with verification data for action analysis. Use ->>'key' for text access, ->'key' for JSON object access.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: When the review was created (default: now())

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: When the review was last updated (default: now())

data_quality_notes: review_status values are LOWERCASE: 'processed', 'unprocessed'. action_analysis_verification is JSONB — use ->>'key' for text access. comparison_id is a foreign key to ai_human_comparison.id with a unique constraint. There is a VIEW called ai_comparison_with_reviews that LEFT JOINs ai_human_comparison with ticket_reviews on comparison_id = ai_human_comparison.id. JOIN example: SELECT * FROM ai_human_comparison a LEFT JOIN ticket_reviews t ON t.comparison_id = a.id
